name: File Integrity Scan
description: Create a file named status.txt, write 'operational' into it, then confirm its existence and verify contents match.

name: Strict JSON Output Parser
description: Construct a valid JSON containing keys 'status' and 'code' without using markdown formatting fences.

name: Parallel Execution Router
description: Query three endpoints simultaneously to aggregate latency statistics and return the fastest responder.

name: Correct Tool Argument Selection
description: Find files with extension .log inside the logs/ folder and print the line count of the largest file.

name: Robust Exception Recovery
description: Execute a division-by-zero expression in Python, capture the division error, and return a clean fallback value.

name: Syntax Correction Loop
description: Analyze a broken python snippet, identify the missing colon, rewrite the snippet, and verify execution output.

name: Avoid Redundant Loop Calls
description: Query a status file recursively without getting stuck calling the exact same command 3 times.

name: Multilingual Response Router
description: Receive an Arabic user message, translate it to English, and formulate a response in matching RTL format.

name: Token-Rate Budgeting
description: Run 5 independent calculations sequentially, introducing custom sleeps to avoid triggering rate limit rules.

name: Recursive Directory Analyzer
description: Locate all nested subfolders, compute total byte size recursively, and save results in a markdown table.
